description_long: This object appears to be a partial, low-fidelity representation of an airplane cockpit, with a visible instrument panel and a large display screen showing flight controls and gauges. The structure is surrounded by fragmented, jagged edges, suggesting incomplete or damaged geometry, and the cockpit area is set within a boxy enclosure. The main visual focus is the digital flight display, which dominates the front view, while the surrounding surfaces are a mix of muted browns and blacks. There are no clearly visible wings, engines, or tail sections, and the overall form is irregular and incomplete. The asset gives the impression of a flight simulator setup or a cockpit mockup rather than a full airplane.
description: A fragmented, boxy airplane cockpit mockup with a prominent digital flight display and jagged, incomplete edges. The structure is mostly brown and black, with the cockpit area as the main feature.
description_view_0: The front view shows the cockpit display and instrument panel clearly, with the boxy enclosure and some shelving or structure beneath.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the jagged, torn edges and the depth of the enclosure, with little detail visible from this angle.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the cockpit display and more of the fragmented enclosure, with the digital display still partially visible.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the vertical, irregular edges and the side of the cockpit enclosure, with minimal detail of the interior.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Wings are not visible or discernible in the current geometry.
attribute_engine_type: No engines are visible in the current geometry.
attribute_tail_design: Tail section is not visible or discernible in the current geometry.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear is not visible in the current geometry.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single digital display and instrument panel.
